hero.title: Stone Gardens
hero.description: Gardens designed to last, carefully maintained through every season.

about.title: About Us
about.description: StoneGardens supports homeowners with garden maintenance, restoration and outdoor layout projects. Each garden is approached with careful attention to detail, seasonal cycles and overall balance. The goal is simple: create outdoor spaces that are enjoyable, durable and easy to maintain.

service-1.title: Garden Maintenance
service-1.description: Regular, seasonal maintenance and garden restoration.

service-2.title: Garden Design & Planting
service-2.description: Garden design, planting and bed creation.

service-3.title: Landscaping
service-3.description: Outdoor layouts, paths, borders and light earthworks.
